layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-8 or p-12 for containers.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento Grid for Marketing/Problem sections. Control Room Grid for 'What's Inside' features.
layout_and_spacing.hero_section: Dark navy (#0F172A) background, split layout. Hero image on right/center. Gold (#D4A017) accent pill.

components.buttons: Rounded-md (subtle). Primary uses Gold (#D4A017). Hover transform -translate-y-1, transition-transform. Always explicitly set hover text color.
components.cards: Subtle border (border-slate-200), flat background (#FFFFFF), no heavy drop shadows unless hovered (shadow-lg).
components.pricing_featured: Elevated card (-translate-y-4 on desktop), gold border (border-[#D4A017]), shadow-xl shadow-[#D4A017]/10. Solid Gold CTA.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI customized. border-slate-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0F172A].

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and interactive cards lift slightly and increase contrast.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling (Lenis style or CSS scroll-behavior: smooth).

images.description: Main digital product bundle cover. Use in Hero section.
ITB Press Publisher Logo. Display in Trust Indicators and Footer.
Mockup of Riset Hibrida 2.0 book. Use in Secondary/Books Section.
Mockup of Protokol Riset Hibrida 2.1 book. Use in Secondary/Books Section.
Premium academic certificate mockup for the Master Bundle promo banner.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The frontend codebase uses React + .js (JSX) files, NOT .tsx (TypeScript). Please write all React code in standard .jsx/.js format without TypeScript types.
CRITICAL: The tech stack has been updated to React + FastAPI (Python). DO NOT use Next.js or Express.
Use Emergent LLM Key (Universal Key) for the Gemini Chatbot instead of the Google AI Studio Key.

Since Duitku and Email credentials are pending, implement configurable/mocked flows for checkout, payment callback, and email delivery. Mock the `/api/create-payment` and `/api/payment-callback` logic in FastAPI.
Hero Section MUST use dark navy (#0F172A) background and gold (#D4A017) text accents, with the provided hero_cover image.
Implement the 'Urgency Banner' in the Hero section with a simulated dynamic counter for the 200 master bundle slots.
The 4 phase iRDR section should be a horizontal scroll on mobile and a 4-column grid on desktop.
The 'What's Inside' section must be an 8-item grid.
Pricing section must feature the 'Skill Pack' prominently (border highlight, gold button).
Checkout Flow should be a Modal triggered by any 'Beli' button, containing the order form fields.
Implement the floating AI Assistant Chatbot using the provided SYSTEM_PROMPT. It must slide up from the bottom.
Include a separate sticky WhatsApp button (Bottom-Left) using the #25D366 brand color.
The 'Secondary Section' for Physical Books must be visually subdued (e.g. bg-slate-100) compared to the main digital pricing section.
Testimonials section should use standard 5-star ratings.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements: buttons, form inputs, links, chat toggle.
Do NOT use generic placeholders for images. Strictly rely on the media_and_assets array provided.
Ensure Shadcn UI components are installed and utilized where applicable (e.g., Dialog for Checkout, Accordion for FAQ, Inputs for forms).
accessibility: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large text.
Include aria-labels for the chat and WhatsApp floating buttons.
Form inputs in the Checkout Modal must have clearly associated labels.
